description: Style Note This simply styled kurta from w is just right for Summer '12. It goes easy on the prints (perfect for when you want a change from the tribal prints we've seen so much of) and styles its silhouette simply without fussy design details. Pair this with either a blingy pair of leggings for an over-the-top ethnic look (the minimalistic kurta will balance out the loud leggings) or simply style it with monochrome ones for a sunny day out. Product Details Red printed V-neck kurta, has short sleeves and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a sizeProduct Details Red printed V-neck kurta, has short sleeves and a vented hem
